title: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
eligibility: Landholding farmer families subject to scheme rules and exclusions.
benefits: Income support to eligible farmer families in instalments.
application: Apply through agriculture office, CSC, or official agriculture portal with land and bank details.

title: Udyogini Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs
eligibility: Women applicants seeking support for small business activities, subject to category and income conditions.
benefits: Financial support and subsidized credit for women entrepreneurship.
application: Apply via women and child development or partner financial institutions in Karnataka.
grievance_office: District Women and Child Development Office

title: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
eligibility: Eligible Bihar students pursuing higher studies subject to official rules.
benefits: Education loan assistance for higher education.
application: Apply through the Bihar government student credit portal or district registration center.

title: Public Distribution System Grievance Support
eligibility: Citizens facing ration card delays, delivery issues, or correction problems.
benefits: Guidance for grievance filing and local office routing.
application: Raise complaint through district food office or state food and civil supplies portal.
grievance_office: District Food and Civil Supplies Office

title: Delhi e-District Citizen Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Delhi seeking government certificates and service requests.
benefits: Single-window digital service access for common citizen applications.
application: Apply through Delhi e-District portal for certificates, welfare services, and status checks.

title: Maharashtra Aaple Sarkar Service Guidance
eligibility: Maharashtra residents applying for state digital services and certificates.
benefits: Unified access to service applications and local office workflows.
application: Use the Maharashtra citizen services portal and district offices for assisted filing.

title: UP eSathi Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Uttar Pradesh requiring digital public service applications.
benefits: Faster access to state-level certificates and service requests.
application: Submit service requests through the UP state portal and district facilitation centers.

title: Puducherry e-District Citizen Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Puducherry, Karaikal, Mahe, and Yanam seeking certificates or other citizen-facing services.
benefits: Single-window access to government-to-citizen services through Puducherry e-District and local facilitation channels.
application: Use the official Puducherry e-District portal or Common Service Centres for certificates, service requests, and status follow-up.

title: Puducherry Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Guidance
eligibility: Farmers and farming households in Puducherry region looking for departmental support, welfare guidance, or agriculture office assistance.
benefits: Access to the Puducherry Agriculture and Farmers Welfare department, local extension support, and region-aware routing for agriculture-related requests.
application: Start from the Government of Puducherry Agriculture and Farmers Welfare page or the Agriculture Department website for local services and office guidance.
grievance_office: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

title: Puducherry School Education Student Support Guidance
eligibility: Students and families in Puducherry seeking school education support, welfare benefits, certificates, or scholarship-related guidance.
benefits: Guidance on education support, school welfare measures, and department-level assistance for students across Puducherry regions.
application: Refer to the Directorate of School Education pages and local Chief Educational Officer offices for service-specific application and follow-up.
grievance_office: Directorate of School Education / Chief Educational Officer

title: Puducherry District Industries Centre Entrepreneur Guidance
eligibility: Entrepreneurs, self-employment seekers, artisans, and women-led small business applicants in the UT of Puducherry.
benefits: Support for entrepreneurship, small industries, training, and district-level industrial guidance through the District Industries Centre network.
application: Use the District Industries Centre portal and regional sub-offices in Puducherry, Karaikal, Mahe, and Yanam for training, clearances, and assistance.

title: Puducherry Public Grievance and Petition Guidance
eligibility: Citizens of Puducherry who need to lodge petitions, escalate service complaints, or seek official grievance redress.
benefits: Clear routing to official grievance channels including CPGRAMS and Puducherry petition monitoring references.
application: Use the Government of Puducherry public grievance link or the District Collectorate petition monitoring system, which points citizens to CPGRAMS for registration.

title: Puducherry Transport Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Puducherry requiring vehicle, licence, permit, or transport-related services.
benefits: Direct routing to the official Puducherry Transport Department services pages and department-managed transport workflows.
application: Use the official Transport Department services portal for transport-related citizen services and department-managed follow-up.
